steps.title: Use the different approach
steps.content: The first sentence says some bands choose unique names to distinguish themselves. Primary took a different approach by naming itself after a song by the Cure. The transition must signal contrast.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast links
steps.content: Choice A signals cause and effect, but Primary's name was not a result of other bands choosing unique names. Choice C signals an example, but Primary does not illustrate that strategy. Choice D signals a second item in a sequence, which is not the relationship here. The remaining transition marks the contrast. The answer is B.
